title: PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responsible for billing and collecting charges for services provided by the Portland Water Bureau and the Bureau of Environmental Services. Establishes guidelines for program providing low-income assistance with owner-occupied fixture repair costs and utility bill discount. Refers individuals to community service agencies to determine eligibility. 664 N Tillamook Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 823-7770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 823-7770 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Water Service Connection/Repair Water Service Providers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - PUBLIC DRINKING FOUNTAINS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WATER LEAK REPAIR ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - CRISIS VOUCHER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU
